description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring broad, heart-shaped green leaves with visible veins, radiating from several thin, brown stems. The plant is housed in a simple, cylindrical pot with a matte, two-tone brown finish, and the soil surface is visible at the base of the stems. The leaves are arranged asymmetrically, with some extending outward and others curving gently upward, giving the plant a lively, organic appearance. The pot appears to be made of ceramic or clay, with a smooth, unadorned surface and no visible drainage holes. The overall size and design suggest it is suitable for indoor decorative use, such as on a tabletop or shelf. There are no visible labels, tags, or additional decorative elements on the pot or plant.
description: A small potted plant with broad, heart-shaped green leaves in a plain, two-tone brown cylindrical pot. The plant has thin stems and a natural, lively arrangement, ideal for indoor decor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plant's broadest leaves fanning out and the full, rounded shape of the pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical orientation of several leaves and the slenderness of the stems.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the soil surface, the convergence of stems, and the pot's cylindrical form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with leaves angled upward and the two-tone color of the pot more visible.
attribute_plant_species: Ficus religiosa (sacred fig) or similar broad-leaf species
